I have worked in tourism for over twenty years.
I run the commercial team at Escape Turismo.
We have just opened two new venues on the coast.
I lived in San Diego when I was twenty.
Hi there! Are you enjoying the fair? I am Thomas, I run a small hotel group in Munich.
Hi Thomas, nice to meet you! I am Andrea, Commercial Director at Escape Turismo. I have worked in hospitality for over twenty years.
Impressive. So, what brings you to the fair this year?
I am looking for new hotel suppliers for our European itineraries. Right now, we are expanding our destinations.
That is perfect timing. We have just opened two new venues on the coast. Let us set up a meeting.
I would love that. Let me get your card, and I will follow up next week to talk about bookings.
Hi, I am Andrea, Commercial Director at Escape Turismo.
I am looking for new hotel partners for our itineraries.
It was great to meet you. Let me get your card.
I will reach out next week to follow up.

Hi Andrea, this is Thomas from Munich. We met at the tourism fair in Berlin last week. It was really great to talk to you at our stand. I have spoken with my team, and we would love to work with Escape Turismo. We have just opened two new venues on the coast, and I think they would be perfect for your European itineraries. Please reach out whenever you have a moment, and we can talk about bookings and rates for next season. I am looking forward to hearing from you. Take care.

Good morning, and welcome to the International Travel and Tourism Fair. We are delighted to have hospitality professionals from more than sixty countries with us today. The networking lounge is now open on the second floor, where you can meet hoteliers, suppliers, and destination partners from around the world. Our keynote on sustainable tourism begins at eleven in the main hall. If you are looking for a specific exhibitor, please reach out to the information desk near the main entrance. We hope you have a productive day and make many valuable connections.
